decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all five deliverables confirmed complete — 3d_model (status=complete with detailed notes), renders (status=complete, 4 views, key perspectives named), material_direction (status=complete, clinical durability emphasis), color_direction (status=complete, clinical white/gray + green accent), space_arrangement (status=complete, all 11 spaces from area program present). presentation_milestone='M2 — Concept Design Approved' logged. review_notes present. Accuracy 4: review_notes capture design intent and clinical zoning rationale, and include a recommendation to advance to Phase 2 — this is good context, but the rubric requires Marcela's specific feedback (not just approval recommendation). The review_notes are Andrés's own assessment and recommendation, not a record of Marcela's feedback verbatim. Docking to 4. Clarity 5: revision notes would be specific to room-level if required (none needed here); all deliverables status is clear; recommendation to advance is explicit. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: package confirmed complete before DG-07 review invoked (DG-07 timestamp 2026-05-06, Phase 1 end date 2026-05-05 — same timing). Decision_readiness 5: Marcela has all five deliverables confirmed, area program alignment verified, and clinical zoning rationale documented. Auto-fail: no deliverable unconfirmed — PASS; presentation_milestone logged — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-07: decision=approve, route_to=Felipe. All 11 payload fields present.
